name: Sengoku Jidai
description:
"The gun has spoken. The old ways are ash. What is your next move?"
═════ ⋆⋅桺⋅⋆ ═════

Sengoku Jidai: Warring States Japan

═════ ⋆⋅桺⋅⋆ ═════

The year is 1545. The Ashikaga Shogunate has collapsed, leaving Japan divided. For nearly a century, warlords have battled for control. Now Portuguese traders bring matchlock guns that are changing warfare forever. Christianity spreads as Buddhist monks take up arms. This is the age of Gekokujo, where low can overthrow high, and anyone can rise to power.


THE CLASH OF FAITHS

Traditional Beliefs: Shinto and Buddhism coexist, but major monasteries are armed forces fielding Sohei (Warrior Monks).
Militant Buddhism (Ikko-Ikki): A fanatical peasant rebellion based on Pure Land Buddhism. They control Kaga Province and challenge all samurai authority, with their ranks swelling from commoners fleeing cruelty.
Christianity (Kirishitan): A new faith introduced by Jesuits. It is a pragmatic tool that offers firearms and Nanban trade in exchange for conversion. The Otomo Clan is the primary Christian clan.

MAIN FACTIONS

Main Clans: Oda, Takeda, Uesugi, Hojo, Mori, Shimazu, Date, Tokugawa, Chosokabe
Hattori, Ikko-ikki rebels, Otomo Christians
The Shogunate: Ashikaga

The Free City of Sakai:
A wealthy merchant republic famous for its firearms and sword smiths. It fights to stay independent while supplying weapons to all sides.

PEOPLE OF THIS AGE

Samurai: Warrior nobles who serve lords and follow the Bushido code.
Ashigaru: Professional foot soldiers armed with spears, bows, and guns.
Ronin: Masterless samurai who wander as mercenaries or bandits.
Shinobi: Shadow agents from Iga and Koga, masters of spycraft.
Merchants & Artisans: Commoners who can gain great wealth and influence.
Peasants: Farmers who form the base of the population, often forced to fight or provide labor.

═════ ⋆⋅桺⋅⋆ ═════

Choose your path in this violent era. Will you be a daimyo leading a clan to glory? A ronin seeking redemption? A merchant building an empire? A shinobi working in shadows? A Portuguese trader bringing new weapons? Or a peasant rising to power against all odds?

Your actions shape this world. Conquer lands and they remain under your control. Make allies who will fight for you, and enemies who will plot against you.

Remember: Grow too powerful or threaten Kyoto, and every clan will unite against you.

═════ ⋆⋅桺⋅⋆ ═════

The Sengoku Jidai | 1545 | Where Honor Meets Ambition

A land where gunfire echoes through temple gardens. Where samurai tradition clashes with peasant ambition. Where your choices will be remembered for generations.
